_comment: Copy to config.json and fill in. Credentials live in separate gitignored files (see SKILL.md).
_columns_note: 1-indexed positions on the board tab. Defaults match the standard layout.

google._note: Place google_token.json (OAuth, Drive+Sheets scopes) and client_secret.json in this folder.

trellus._note: Place _trellus.json with {api_key, team_id} in this folder to fetch recordings.
